name: write_xdef
short_description: Write Xilinx physical design exchange to a file.  The XDEF contains placement, clustering, and routing information and relates logical design objects to the device model.
full_help:
write_xdef

Description: 
Write Xilinx physical design exchange to a file.  The XDEF contains placement, clustering, and routing information and relates logical design objects to the device model.

Syntax: 
write_xdef  [-print_release_version] [-force] [-no_routing] [-mode <arg>]
            [-cell <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Usage: 
  Name                      Description
  -------------------------------------
  [-print_release_version]  Print out the release version of the file
  [-force]                  Overwrite existing XDEF file if necessary
  [-no_routing]             Do not write the routing data
  [-mode]                   (Verilog|VHDL|EDIF) Rename logical cells and nets
                            in the output XDEF to match names in the given 
                            output file type.
  [-cell]                   Write the XDEF as if the given cell was the top 
                            level cell in the design.
  [-quiet]                  Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]                Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>                    Output file name

Categories: 
FileIO
